title: Query gives "39000!program contains errors" after updating to 11.9.5-20120516
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String NOT NULL, value Nullable(Int32) CHECK (value >= 0), created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN id UInt32 DEFAULT generateUUIDv4();
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR value < 5;
key_bug_features: Query execution after updating to version 11.9.5
